criteria.label: Payoff concreteness
criteria.notes: n=30 threshold, total variation distance metric, 5% bound, concrete downstream actions.

criteria.label: Staircase coherence
criteria.notes: Eight rungs build cleanly. Minor: rung 4 (visual convergence) overlaps rung 3 conceptually.

criteria.label: Narration clarity
criteria.notes: Symbols defined at first appearance. Minor: MGF factoring step relies on independence but algebraic step not spelled out.

criteria.label: Board specificity
criteria.notes: Histograms, bell overlay, Cauchy comparison all specified. Minor: 'contrasting color' for bell overlay not named.

criteria.label: Board coherence
criteria.notes: Timeline well-ordered. Minor: canvas dense by t=198 with 10+ elements simultaneously present.

criteria.label: Board visual balance
criteria.notes: Four distinct draws covering histograms, bell overlay, tail comparison.

criteria.label: Math and notation correctness
criteria.notes: All formulas correct. Minor notational shorthand at t=143.

criteria.label: Code-content decision
criteria.notes: Python snippet correctly simulates the dice experiment; numpy default_rng, density-normalized histograms.

criteria.label: Pacing and density
criteria.notes: 9 beats / 270s averages 30s/beat. Beat at t=105 dense (MGF definition + Z_n standardization).

criteria.label: Redundancy and focus
criteria.notes: Practical n>=30 rule deliberately repeated in payoff/closing/board. Closing beat partly restates payoff.

topThreeIssues: Board canvas crowding from t=143-198: 8+ simultaneous elements with no intermediate erases; add strategic erases before MGF proof section
MGF factoring step at t=143 algebraically abrupt; add intermediate form M_{Z_n}(t) = [M_{(X_i-mu)/(sigma/sqrt(n))}(t)]^n explicitly
Closing beat (t=240) restates opening payoff near-verbatim instead of synthesizing MGF proof back to practical rule
summary: Well-constructed plan with maximally concrete payoff, nearly gap-free staircase, precise destination, specific and mostly coherent board, correct math. Main weaknesses: crowded canvas during proof segment, abrupt MGF factoring step, and closing beat that restates payoff rather than synthesizing.
